authors.author: Eliza Edmunds Hewitt
John R. Sweney
Hätte ich mehr von Jesus nur

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v3 v4 v3 v4 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wake up every morning With a prayer in my soul Thanking God for my blessings And for help as I grow

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And, no matter what my day brings I know just who I need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I need more Jesus, Jesus, Jesus A little more light A little more love A little more hope

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need more Jesus, Jesus, Jesus When I’m by His side He lifts my heart up And fills me with joy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: As I walk with my Savior Hand in hand, every day I’ll share smiles like the sunshine Making friends on my way

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Living life with care and kindness I know just who I need

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: His arms are wide open He tells me I’m chosen I’m a better me when I choose Him
